_comment: FALLBACK port values — used by both TypeScript (config/ports.ts) and the Vite build (gui/vite.config.js). The RUNTIME source of truth is the .env file; these JSON defaults only fire when an env var is unset. To change ports for an installation, set API_PORT / ORCHESTRATOR_PORT / GUI_PORT / PARTITION_SERVER_PORT / PROXY_PORT / MATH_LAB_PORT / NN_LAB_PORT / CRITIQUE_LAB_PORT in .env. Edit this JSON only if the entire fallback block must move.
